name: title-slide-ab-opus46-high-isolated
description: Weak title-slide prompts using Claude Opus 4.6 with high reasoning effort in isolated Copilot child processes
goal: Measure whether strict process isolation improves prompt fidelity and stability for weak title-slide cases

prompts.text: Build a title slide for an M&A strategy review on acquiring a cybersecurity startup for growth acceleration
Build a title slide for investor day highlighting AI-led expansion and path to $500M ARR
Build a title slide for an ESG update on reducing carbon emissions 40% by 2030
Build a title slide for the launch of a new enterprise security platform
